title: Project purpose
purpose: Explain that this is a public reference and change-tracking project for observed Yahoo Finance API behavior.

title: What this project tracks
purpose: List fields, schemas, endpoint outputs, symbol coverage, market states, null/missing results, and schema drift.

title: What this project does not do
purpose: Set boundaries: not official Yahoo documentation, not a trading system, not primarily app debugging or software development.

title: Quick start
purpose: Show the simplest path: download release, open workbook/CSV, run a symbol lookup, report observations.

title: Repository map
purpose: Explain major folders and where public users should look first.

title: How to report changes
purpose: Describe the observation report workflow and minimum information needed.

title: Current status
purpose: Summarize current release status, master field row count, and known black-box app limitations.
